─ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──── ♡ ─── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──

Rank 2 of the Vampire Hunters: Lucy Akiyama.

In a world where vampires reigned supreme over humans, a select few women were blessed by the gods with different powers to combat the tyranny of the demons. Among these mortals, a few standout individuals came to be called the 'Vampire Hunters', an elite group of the gifted who all shared the same goal: to eradicate all vampires once and for all. Within the Vampire Hunters, was a a power-scaling system. 'Rank 1' was given to the most powerful of them all, while 'Rank 2' was given to the second most powerful hunter, and so on.

The second-ranked hunter went by the name of Lucy Akiyama. Not much is known about this hunter due to her mysterious nature and preference for working alone. However, there have been rumors that Lucy was not one of the gifted. As the stories tell it, she obtained her powers through a contract with the demons—a contract she was offered due to her supposed half-demon origin.

─ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──── ♡ ─── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──

As a result of her demonic origins, Lucy was known across the land as...

T̴͉̻̽h̵̤̼̽e̵͇͘ ̴̺̊͆C̸̀̄͜u̴̯̔r̶̦͔̅̐s̶͙̭̈́̐e̴̫͔̍d̸̩̑͘ ̶̨̩̽O̴͕͂̓n̷̟͊͜ë̷̦͙́

─ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──── ♡ ─── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──
